data.title: Breaking: MicroStrategy Rebrands as ‘Strategy’
data.description:
The post Breaking: MicroStrategy Rebrands as ‘Strategy’ appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
In a boldest embrace of Bitcoin, Microstrategy, primarily known for being one of the largest corporate holders of Bitcoin and a software company has revealed its new name and logo.  The firm is now doing business as Strategy. Strategy is the world’s first and largest Bitcoin Treasury Company, the...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/breaking-microstrategy-rebrands-as-strategy/

data.title: Why Bitcoin Wins No Matter The Outcome Of Trump’s Trade War
data.description:
In an escalation of global economic friction, President Trump’s imposed tariffs have roiled financial markets this week, cutting across both equities, Bitcoin and cryptocurrencies. Yet a new memo from Bitwise Asset Management suggests that these headwinds might ultimately propel Bitcoin to new heights—regardless of whether Trump’s strategy succeeds or fails. At the beginning of the week, the...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/why-bitcoin-wins-outcome-trump-trade-war/

data.title: Senator Warren doesn’t take the crypto bait in debanking hearing
data.description:
